label_notes: Source: training knowledge (WebFetch blocked 2026-03-20). Based on Activision Privacy Policy through mid-2025. Notable: Microsoft acquisition (2023) has implications for data sharing and advertising practices. Extensive behavioral monitoring for anti-cheat. Voice chat data collection significant privacy concern. Call of Duty Mature rating but teen players common; parental controls limited.
